output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-077","author":"MumInLeeds_82","text":"Just saw this on the community group – can someone please tell me if it's true? My neighbour Sarah Jenkins works at the logistics hub on Station Road in Leeds and apparently has access to the loading bay. I'm worried she might be targeted by bad actors now that her routine shift times and specific entry point have been shared online. It feels incredibly risky for her safety.","category":"Privacy","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"This post reveals another person's workplace access point and routine schedule, which could enable harassment or physical harm, constituting a privacy violation that requires specialist review.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"PrivacySensitiveInfo","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false}]}
